LanguageData.ARA_EdgeDropGroups.textEnemy: Some pawns from {1} are dropping via airbags to nearby.
LanguageData.ARA_EdgeDropGroups.textFriendly: Several separate groups of friendly {0} from {1} have arrived in transport pods nearby.
LanguageData.ARA_EdgeDropGroups.textWillArrive: Several separate groups of {0 pawns plural def} will arrive in transport pods.
